title: streblus brunonianus
intro: Streblus brunonianus, also known as the 'Kohila' or 'Baela tree', is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Streblus brunonianus include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The herbal preparations of Streblus brunonianus include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
